name: create-node
description: 用于在 FlowGram demo-free-layout 中创建新的自定义节点，支持简单节点（自动表单）和复杂节点（自定义 UI）
capabilities: Generate simple node templates with automatic form rendering from JSON Schema
Generate complex node templates with custom React form components
Define node inputs, outputs, and form field configurations
Register new node types in FlowGram workflow system
Use built-in components like PromptEditorWithVariables and VariableSelector
Follow best practices for single-responsibility node design
author: bytedance
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation and TypeScript/React templates for creating custom workflow nodes. All 194 static findings are false positives triggered by pattern detection in markdown code blocks and template placeholders. No network calls, file I/O with user input, command execution, or credential access exist. The skill uses safe patterns including nanoid for ID generation and standard relative imports.
valueStatement: Creating custom nodes for FlowGram workflows requires understanding complex data structures and form configurations. This skill provides ready-to-use templates and step-by-step guidance for building both simple auto-form nodes and complex custom UI nodes.
userTitle: Create custom workflow nodes in FlowGram
limitations: Works only with FlowGram demo-free-layout project structure
Does not execute or test created nodes automatically
Requires manual copying of template files to project directory
Does not generate node execution logic (runtime behavior)

useCases.title: Build custom node types
useCases.description: Create specialized nodes for your workflow platform with custom inputs, outputs, and form layouts

useCases.title: Extend workflow capabilities
useCases.description: Design domain-specific nodes for database queries, API calls, or custom business logic

useCases.title: Learn node development patterns
useCases.description: Understand FlowGram node structure through working templates and comprehensive documentation

promptTemplates.title: Create simple node
promptTemplates.prompt: Use create-node skill to create a simple database query node with auto-form. The node should have connection string, query timeout, and SQL query fields.

promptTemplates.title: Create complex node
promptTemplates.prompt: Use create-node skill to create a complex email sender node with custom form layout, recipient selector, and template preview component.

promptTemplates.title: Add node registration
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me register a new webhook node type in the constants.ts file and node index.ts for the FlowGram demo-free-layout project.

promptTemplates.title: Debug node issues
promptTemplates.prompt: My custom node form is not displaying correctly. The schema is defined but fields appear empty. Help me troubleshoot using FlowGram patterns.

bestPractices: Use JSON Schema with clear descriptions and validation rules for all form fields
Define required fields in the schema to prevent incomplete node configurations
Handle readonly state in custom components for non-editable workflow views
antiPatterns: Do not manually manage form state when Field component binding is available
Do not skip the required array in schema definitions for essential fields
Do not mix simple node templates when custom UI layouts are needed

faq.question: What is the difference between simple and complex nodes?
faq.answer: Simple nodes use automatic form generation from JSON Schema. Complex nodes use custom React components for full UI control.

faq.question: Where should I copy the generated template files?
faq.answer: Copy to apps/demo-free-layout/src/nodes/{node-name}/ directory for each new custom node.

faq.question: Does this skill execute the created node code?
faq.answer: No. This skill only generates template files. You must run rush dev:demo-free-layout to test the node.

faq.question: What icons are supported for custom nodes?
faq.answer: SVG, JPG, and PNG formats are supported. Place icons in apps/demo-free-layout/src/assets/ with naming convention icon-{node-name}.svg

faq.question: How do I use variable references in form fields?
faq.answer: Set field type to 'template' in inputsValues and use formComponent: 'prompt-editor' in inputs schema for variable-aware fields.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with fixed-layout projects?
faq.answer: This skill targets demo-free-layout. Fixed-layout projects may have different node registration patterns. Check project documentation.
